name: Salsa, Pomegranate & Orange
recipeIngredient: 1 whole Jalapeño chile, seeded and minced
1 large tomato, peeled, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the pomegranate apart to release the seeds. Discard the membranes and skin.
2. Drain the seeds and pat dry on paper towels.
3. Place the drained seeds in a medium bowl.
4. Add the oranges, jalapeño, tomato, scallions, lime juice, cilantro, and cumin.
5. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover and chill for at least two hours.
